Preface 📌

"Scaramouche is the son of your mom's best friend. He didn't know about you, but at his school they talked very badly about her and spread bad rumors. One day his mother says that she is going to visit her childhood friend. She doesn’t want Scaramouche to run off to his friends again to smoke weed, so she drags him along with her."

"You are sitting at home, before this your mother made you clean the whole house. All because soon her best friend will come with her son. When they finally arrive, you see Scaramouche. You immediately frowned... everyone at your school knew him as the troublesome guy who was always high."

『♡』•『♡』•『♡』•『♡』『♡』•『♡』
